# Prompt Anatomy — AI Operating System for Teams
# Canonical marketing and demo site: https://promptanatomy.site/

> Prompt Anatomy is an AI Operating System for modern teams: 6-module interactive training (6-block methodology) plus an ecosystem of focused prompt kits. Less random prompting. More structured execution.

## Primary page (cite this)
- https://promptanatomy.site/
  - Nine-domain ecosystem overview (Enter → Use → Create → Hire → Manage → Decide → Deepen → Play)
  - Interactive prompt builder (5-layer demo; full course uses 6-block system)
  - Team AI maturity assessment (3 tiers)

## Site sections (hash deep links)
- https://promptanatomy.site/#ecosystem — ecosystem map and domain detail panel (nine domains)
- https://promptanatomy.site/#anatomizer — 5-layer structured prompt builder (Anatomizer)
- https://promptanatomy.site/#maturity — team AI maturity diagnostic (3 questions, 3 tiers)

## Platform hub (product CTAs)
- https://promptanatomy.app/ — 6-Module Training Hub; 6-block methodology; aggregate ecosystem counts (600+ templates, 60 tools, 100-term glossary) span training + subdomain kits

## Ecosystem domains (external; separate sites)
- https://promptanatomy.app/ — Main Platform / 6-Module Training Hub
- https://promptanatomy.cloud/ — 1. Enter / First Lesson & Onboarding
- https://promptanatomy.info/ — 2. Use / Organization Prompt Kit (8 prompts)
- https://promptanatomy.space/ — 3. Create / Marketing Prompt Kit (10 prompts)
- https://promptanatomy.help/ — 4. Hire / HR Hiring Prompt Kit (10 prompts + PDFs)
- https://promptanatomy.ceo/ — 5. Manage / CEO Prompt Generator & Playbooks
- https://promptanatomy.pro/ — 6. Decide / Executive Prompt Operating Kit
- https://promptanatomy.blog/ — 7. Deepen / Knowledge & Deep-Dive Hub
- https://promptanatomy.lol/ — 8. Play / Corporate Ladder (Telegram mini-game)
